prerequisites: An active Cin7 Core (formerly DEAR Inventory) account with permission to manage integrations.
Account ID for the Cin7 Core account (the accountid config field).
A Cin7 Core API Application Key to use as the api_key secret.

authMethods.name: API key (Account ID + Application Key)
authMethods.summary: Cin7 Core authenticates each request with two credentials generated together in the app: an Account ID and an API Application Key. The Account ID maps to the accountid config field and the Application Key maps to the api_key secret field. Both are issued when you create an API application under Integrations.

setupSteps.title: Sign in to Cin7 Core
setupSteps.body: Log in to your Cin7 Core (DEAR Inventory) account at the inventory web app with a user that can manage integrations.

setupSteps.title: Open Integrations > API
setupSteps.body: From the left menu go to Integrations, then API, and select Cin7 Core API. Click the add (+) button to create a new API application and give it a recognizable name.

setupSteps.title: Create the application and copy the credentials
setupSteps.body: Create the application, then copy the displayed Account ID and API Application Key. Treat the Application Key as a secret since it grants access to your inventory data.

setupSteps.title: Enter the credentials in the connector
setupSteps.body: Set accountid to the copied Account ID and set api_key to the copied API Application Key. Both fields are required.
